Thank you for giving HOPE

What began as a simple call for help turned into a wave of compassion.

Project Hope, Phase 01 in Gampaha came to life because of you, our Kelly Felder Loyalty customers, with your generosity lighting the way for families who needed it most.

Note: To uphold the privacy of the families assisted, images from the distribution will not be shared. This communication serves only to acknowledge your contribution and let you see how far your kindness travelled.
